status.connectionTimeout: Timed out connecting to {{name}} — retry or switch AI assistant
status.chatDbUnavailable: Chat history cannot be saved (local database not ready). Quit MetaMates completely and reopen — you can still chat, but history may not persist.
status.ready: {{name}} detected — focus the input to connect
status.reconnectHint: Connection lost. Reconnect or switch to another AI assistant.
status.quotaExceededDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} returned an error: {{error}}

Switch to another AI assistant, or check this assistant's API key / plan status.
status.geminiModelDailyQuota: {{agent}} daily limit reached for the current model
status.geminiModelDailyQuotaDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} reported: {{error}}

This usually means the **selected model** hit its daily free cap — not that your API key balance is empty. Switch to Auto or another model in the picker, or verify in a terminal with `gemini`.
status.networkErrorDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} could not complete the request: {{error}}

Check network, proxy, or firewall; you can also run the assistant in a terminal to compare.
status.emptyTurn: The assistant finished but produced no visible reply. Check whether a tool permission was denied, then retry.
status.planExpiredDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} subscription or plan expired: {{error}}

Renew the service or switch to another AI assistant.
status.upstreamBillingDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} upstream account issue (**not a MetaMates bug**): {{error}}

Run the assistant CLI in a terminal to verify; if the CLI fails too, renew or top up the provider account (e.g. DashScope / Alibaba Cloud).
status.upstreamQuotaDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} upstream quota or rate limit (**not a MetaMates bug**): {{error}}

Switch to another AI assistant, or check API key / plan status in a terminal.
status.connectFailedDetail:
⚠️ Could not connect to {{agent}}: {{error}}

If the CLI works in a terminal, this is usually an upstream account, network, or proxy issue — not MetaMates.
status.promptFailedDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} could not complete the request: {{error}}

If the CLI works in a terminal, this is usually an upstream service issue — not MetaMates.
status.authRequiredDetail:
⚠️ {{agent}} requires sign-in: {{error}}

Complete `claude auth login` in a terminal or configure ~/.claude/settings.json.
status.agentNotReadyDetail: Assistant not ready — message was not sent. Wait for connection or see the error below.
status.typeWhileConnecting: Type now — we'll connect when you send
status.thinkingVerySlow: {{agent}} is slow ({{seconds}}s) — stop or switch AI assistant

input.attachHint: Type @ for files, drag attachments, or tap the mic for voice (up to {{max}} chars)
input.attachTruncated: Attachment content was truncated to {{max}} chars; ask the AI assistant to Read large files
input.voiceListening: Listening… text updates as you speak; tap again when done
input.voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported here
input.voiceDenied: Microphone access denied — allow it in system settings
input.voiceNetwork: Voice needs network for browser speech recognition. Install the Offline Speech extension for offline use, or type instead.
input.voiceServiceBlocked: Web Speech is blocked in this environment — please type instead
input.voiceCapture: Cannot access microphone — check system permissions
input.voiceStartFailed: Could not start speech recognition — try again later
input.voiceNativeFailed: Windows speech recognition failed — check microphone permissions or system speech components
input.voiceWhisperFailed: Local speech recognition failed — try again or type instead
input.voiceWhisperModel: Offline speech extension is installed but the model is missing — reinstall the extension
input.voiceWhisperPlugin: Install the Offline Speech extension to use local Whisper

message.copyFailed: Copy failed — select the text manually

workspace.switched: Switched to inspiration vault {{path}} — loading conversations for this vault…

panel.title: Thinking engine
panel.vaultHint: {{agent}} reads and writes notes in your vault — results go to files, not just chat.
panel.vaultHintGeneric: Connect AI and chat on the right to read and write vault files.

messages.intelEnhancing: AI assistant is deepening the intelligence summary…
messages.intelNeedInput: Paste a URL, path, or text — or @-attach a file

auth.title: Sign in to AI assistant
auth.inProgress: Signing in — complete authorization in your browser…
auth.browserHint: If the browser did not open automatically, use the link below:
auth.claudeTerminalLogin: Log in to Claude via PowerShell
auth.claudeTerminalLoginHint: Run claude auth login, or set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN in ~/.claude/settings.json env.
auth.terminalLoginHint: On Windows: run gemini in PowerShell — your browser should open for Google sign-in.
auth.terminalLoginFailed: Could not open PowerShell login window
auth.deprecatedGoogleLogin: Google personal Code Assist sign-in has changed. Use "Gemini API key" or run gemini in a terminal for first-time login.
auth.bannerHint: Check connection in Settings → AI assistants, or sign in when you send a message.

permission.title: Tool permission request
permission.dismissed: Tool permission denied — the assistant may not complete the action or show a reply
permission.toolRequest: AI assistant wants to run a tool

yoloWarning.title: Auto-approve mode
yoloWarning.body: In this mode MetaMates auto-approves file read/write and command execution without asking each time. Only enable if you trust the current AI assistant and have backed up your vault.
yoloWarning.firstRunBody: MetaMates defaults to auto-approve: the AI assistant's file writes and commands run without a prompt each time. Choose "Switch to Default" if you want to confirm every tool call.

toolCall.outsideWorkspace: This path is outside your inspiration vault — MetaMates cannot open it here: {{path}}
toolCall.outsideWorkspaceHint: ⚠️ AI assistant wrote outside your inspiration vault: {{path}}

writeback.failedDetail: ⚠️ /{{cmd}} expected writeback to {{paths}}, but no recent update detected: {{detail}}
writeback.detailStaleMtime: File exists but was not updated by this /{{cmd}} run (AI assistant may have replied in chat only)
writeback.detailNoRecentNotes: No recently created or updated notes in folder
